## CustomConstraintRegistration.comparePayloads property

Optional comparator for payloads belonging to the same custom constraint. Return values follow the `Array.prototype.sort()` contract.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly comparePayloads?: (left: ExtensionPayloadValue, right: ExtensionPayloadValue) => number;
```
